use_cases: Display customer testimonials and social proof on landing pages
Build trust with potential customers through featured reviews
Showcase user feedback in a rotating carousel format
Highlight endorsements on product or service pages
Create credibility sections for marketing websites
ai_summary: A testimonial slider component featuring customer reviews with navigation controls, designed to showcase social proof and build trust on landing pages or product sections. The component includes interactive elements with hover states and smooth transitions between testimonial cards.
